description.description: Human-readable description of what this command does

category.description: Category for grouping commands (testing, development, build, quality, documentation, database, etc.)

name.description: Namespace identifier for generated output directories (must be valid directory name: start with alphanumeric, may contain dots, hyphens, underscores)

language.description: Language to scope mapping. Keys are language names, values are scope identifiers for command naming.

^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*$.description: Scope identifier: lowercase start, alphanumeric + hyphens/underscores, 2-20 chars

logfile.description: Optional path to log file for test output. Templates use {% if repo.logfile %} conditional logic to reference this path. Defaults to null (no log file).

setup.description: Read-only flag indicating repository setup status. Used by setup.md skill. Engineers edit this field manually in config.

agentFile.description: Controls the output filename for the agent rules file. AGENTS generates AGENTS.md, CLAUDE generates CLAUDE.md.

hasUI.description: Whether the repository has UI components

hasDB.description: Whether the repository has database access

hasTypecheck.description: Whether the repository has type checking

handlesConfidentialData.description: Application processes confidential or sensitive data

commands.description: Command definitions. Core commands (test, lint, typecheck) use language-specific defaults from commands/{language}.yml if not specified. Multi-language repos use scoped commands: {scope}_test, {scope}_lint, {scope}_typecheck.

test.description: Command to run tests (optional - uses default from commands/{language}.yml if not specified)

test_summary.description: Command to run tests with summary output using quiet flags (optional - for gate checks where pass/fail suffices)

test_unit.description: Command to run unit tests only (optional - fast tests without external dependencies)

test_integration.description: Command to run integration tests only (optional - slower tests using external resources)

test_e2e.description: Command to run end-to-end tests (optional - full system tests)

lint.description: Command to run linter (optional - uses default from commands/{language}.yml if not specified)

typecheck.description: Command to run type checker (optional - uses default from commands/{language}.yml if not specified)

^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*_(test|lint|typecheck)$.description: Scoped core commands for multi-language repos: {scope}_test, {scope}_lint, {scope}_typecheck where scope matches pattern ^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*$

additionalProperties.description: Additional commands should use extended format with description and category for proper documentation

metadata.description: Metadata added by the generation system (optional, present in generated configs)

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this config was generated

framework_version.description: Version of the Midtempo Framework used to generate this config

page.description: Path to instruction file relative to instructions/ directory

description.description: Human-readable description of what this instruction covers
Human-readable description of the security domain
